ecology.configuration.title: Ecology Config
jei.ecology.wax_goggles.line1: Highlights a bee's saved flower and crop route while worn.
jei.ecology.wax_goggles.line2: Look directly at a bee to render its current path, or press R to lock it.
message.ecology.bee_route_warning: You are blocking this bee's route.
message.ecology.bee_feature_disabled: Ecology bee simulation is disabled in the config.
message.ecology.hive_day_simulated: Simulated hive day %s. Advanced %s stored bee(s); aged %s bee(s); readied %s worker(s).
message.ecology.hive_day_simulated_no_co: No Ecology colony to simulate. Advanced %s stored bee(s); aged %s bee(s); readied %s worker(s).
message.ecology.cutout.night_required: Wait until night before cutting out this nest.
message.ecology.cutout.smoke_required: Smoke the nest with a lit campfire first.
message.ecology.cutout.empty: There is no colony to cut out.
message.ecology.cutout.success: Cut out the nest and captured %s worker bee(s). Brood comb recorded %s drone(s).
message.ecology.brood_comb.no_queen: This brood comb has no queen; use it for worker support, not starting a colony.
message.ecology.brood_comb.hive_not_read: Brood comb must be installed into an empty player hive.
message.ecology.brood_comb.installed: Installed brood comb with a %s day old queen.
message.ecology.worker_bee.needs_brood: Install brood comb or a queen cell first so these workers have a colony to join.
message.ecology.honeycomb.cutout_require: Cut out and empty this nest first.
message.ecology.village.disabled: Village ecology is disabled in the config.
message.ecology.village.categories: Food %s, shelter %s, safety %s, green %s, water %s, upkeep %s
message.ecology.village.landscape: Landscape: %s crop(s), %s mature, %s flower(s), %s water, %s path
message.ecology.village.supply.catchup: Simulated %s day(s) of unloaded supply work.
message.ecology.village.supply.shortage: Shortage: %s trades may restock with fewer uses.
message.ecology.village.supply.steady: Village supply is balanced enough for normal trade capacity.
message.ecology.village.supply.confined: Market issue: %s confined trader(s). Prices climb until villagers can reach homes and meeting space.
message.ecology.village.supply.donate_un: That item does not map to a village supply category.
message.ecology.village.household.summar: %s household(s), %s partnered, %s child villager(s), %s saved currency.
message.ecology.village.household.empty_: %s empty home(s) are available for adult children or new households.
message.ecology.village.household.plots: House plots: %s approved, %s reserved, %s completed vanilla home(s).
message.ecology.village.household.move_o: %s adult child villager(s) are still living with parents.
message.ecology.village.household.crowde: %s household(s) need more beds or a larger home.
message.ecology.village.household.expans: %s crowded household(s) have enough savings to fund an expansion.
message.ecology.village.household.none: No household records yet. Villagers will form households as they settle, trade, and raise children.
message.ecology.village.household.deed.n: No loaded occupants are nearby, but this home is claimed.
message.ecology.village.household.deed.u: This deed is no longer close enough to a claimed household home.
message.ecology.village.household.plot.n: Mark a village bell with the ledger before approving house plots.
message.ecology.village.household.plot.w: The marked village bell is in another dimension.
message.ecology.village.household.plot.f: Marked first house plot corner at %s. Use the ledger with a banner on the opposite corner.
message.ecology.village.household.plot.s: House plots must be between %s and %s blocks wide and deep.
message.ecology.village.household.plot.l: House plots need mostly level corners.
message.ecology.village.household.plot.b: That plot cannot fit a vanilla village house. Clear the space above it and make sure the ground is solid.
cramped with no home or meeting access
cannot reach home, meeting space, or work
cannot reach a village meeting point
has enough access to village life
message.ecology.village.inspect.advice.n: Advice: add a reachable workstation so this villager can choose a profession.
message.ecology.village.inspect.advice.d: Advice: this villager wants to become a %s; make sure that workstation is reachable.
message.ecology.village.inspect.advice.c: Advice: give this villager room and path access to home and meeting space.
message.ecology.village.inspect.advice.s: Advice: clear a path to the assigned market stall.
message.ecology.village.stall.disabled: Village market stalls are disabled in the config.
message.ecology.village.stall.no_stored: Mark a stall first: crouch-use the ledger on the stall tile with your other hand empty.
message.ecology.village.stall.wrong_dime: That marked stall is in another dimension.
message.ecology.village.stall.assigned: Assigned villager to market stall at %s.
message.ecology.village.stall.assigned_u: Assigned stall at %s, but the villager cannot path there yet.
message.ecology.village.relocation.wrong: That marked village is in another dimension.
message.ecology.village.relocation.baby: Baby villagers will join village life when they grow up.
message.ecology.village.relocation.missi: The marked village bell is missing.
message.ecology.village.relocation.follo: Guiding this villager toward the village at %s.
message.ecology.village.relocation.adopt: Adopted this villager into the village at %s.
message.ecology.village.trade.disabled: Village player trades are disabled in the config.
message.ecology.village.trade.baby: Baby villagers cannot manage tradeboards yet.
message.ecology.village.trade.confined: This villager needs access to village life before using player-stocked trades.
message.ecology.village.trade.incomplete: Mark a tradeboard, input inventory, and output inventory with the ledger first.
message.ecology.village.trade.board.inva: Tradeboard must be a filled rectangle no larger than 15 x 15.
message.ecology.village.trade.storage.re: Marked input inventory at %s. Mark an output inventory next.
message.ecology.village.trade.storage.in: That block is not a usable inventory.
message.ecology.village.trade.storage.sa: Input and output inventories must be different blocks.
message.ecology.village.trade.wrong_dime: The marked tradeboard setup is in another dimension.
message.ecology.village.trade.assigned: Assigned tradeboard %s to this villager with input %s and output %s.
message.ecology.village.trade.stock_miss: Tradeboard stock changed before this trade could be debited.
message.ecology.village.trade.output_ful: Tradeboard output inventory is full; dropped extra currency.
message.ecology.tradeboard.empty: Empty trade slot. Use an item to set output or village currency to set price.
message.ecology.tradeboard.summary: Trade slot: %s x %s for %s village currency.
message.ecology.tradeboard.invalid: Tradeboard is not a filled rectangle or is larger than 15 x 15.
ecology.village.advice.no_villagers: Survey near an active village center, or bring villagers here before expecting settlement ecology.
ecology.village.advice.low_food: Add farmland, mature crops, composters, farmers, and nearby water.
ecology.village.advice.low_shelter: Add beds, doors, job blocks, and a bell to make the village feel settled.
ecology.village.advice.unsafe: Improve lighting, keep golems alive, and clear hostile pressure around paths.
ecology.village.advice.low_green_space: Plant flowers, saplings, hedges, and small gardens near paths and gathering places.
ecology.village.advice.low_water: Add wells, ponds, canals, or farm water inside the village survey radius.
ecology.village.advice.low_maintenance: Add paths, composters, bells, and workstations; villagers will slowly patch small gaps.
ecology.village.advice.steady: This village is well balanced; keep farms, paths, green space, and safety maintained.
message.ecology.journal.empty: The journal has no hive records.
message.ecology.journal.entry_swarm_read: Warning: this colony is ready to swarm.
message.ecology.queen_cell.not_ready: This colony is not ready to raise a queen cell.
message.ecology.queen_cell.no_colony: This hive has no colony record yet.
message.ecology.queen_cell.missing_queen: This colony needs a queen before it can raise queen brood.
message.ecology.queen_cell.needs_workers: Queen cells need a queen and at least two workers.
message.ecology.queen_cell.unhealthy: Stabilize this colony before preparing a queen cell.
message.ecology.queen_cell.low_health: This colony is too stressed to prepare queen brood.
message.ecology.queen_cell.no_brood_need: This colony is not trying to raise new brood yet.
message.ecology.queen_cell.ready_to_harv: This colony can raise a queen cell.
message.ecology.queen_cell.install_not_p: This queen cell has no prepared colony data.
message.ecology.queen_cell.install_not_e: Prepared queen cells must be installed into an empty hive.
message.ecology.queen_cell.install_ready: This queen cell can start a daughter colony here.
message.ecology.queen_cell.harvested: Prepared a queen cell from this colony.
message.ecology.queen_cell.install_faile: Use a prepared queen cell on an empty hive.
message.ecology.queen_cell.installed: Installed the queen cell and started a daughter colony.
message.ecology.swarm_lure.failed: This colony cannot swarm right now, or no empty hive is nearby.
message.ecology.swarm_lure.no_colony: This hive has no colony ready to swarm.
message.ecology.swarm_lure.queen_exclude: The queen excluder is preventing swarming.
message.ecology.swarm_lure.missing_queen: A colony needs a queen before it can swarm.
message.ecology.swarm_lure.needs_workers: A swarm needs a queen and at least two workers.
message.ecology.swarm_lure.unhealthy: Stabilize this colony before splitting it.
message.ecology.swarm_lure.cooldown: This colony has swarmed recently and needs time to recover.
message.ecology.swarm_lure.not_crowded: This colony is not crowded enough to split yet.
message.ecology.swarm_lure.inbred: This colony is too inbred to split safely.
message.ecology.swarm_lure.low_forage: Add more nearby flowers or pollination crops before swarming.
message.ecology.swarm_lure.no_empty_hive: Place an empty hive nearby for the daughter swarm.
message.ecology.swarm_lure.ready: This colony is ready to send out a daughter swarm.
message.ecology.swarm_lure.success: The colony sent out a daughter swarm.
message.ecology.apiary_treatment.no_colo: There is no colony here to treat.
ecology.advice.no_colony: Start a colony here with brood comb or a prepared queen cell.
ecology.advice.abandoned: This hive was cut out or abandoned; seal the old nest or start a new colony.
ecology.advice.doomed: The colony cannot reproduce until it has both a queen and workers.
ecology.advice.missing_queen: Install brood comb or a prepared queen cell so workers have a queen to support.
ecology.advice.no_workers: Add captured workers; a queen alone cannot forage or grow the colony.
ecology.advice.low_workers: Add more workers or use brood frames until the colony can sustain routes.
ecology.advice.overcrowded: Place an empty hive nearby, harvest a queen cell, or use a queen excluder to prevent swarming.
ecology.advice.inbred: Introduce unrelated colonies before breeding this line further.
ecology.advice.aging_queen: Prepare a queen cell before the old queen ages out.
ecology.advice.unmated_queen: Keep drones from another lineage nearby so the queen can mate.
ecology.advice.low_forage: Plant flowers and pollination crops within hive range.
ecology.advice.swarm_ready: Place an empty hive nearby for a daughter swarm, or use a queen excluder to hold the colony.
ecology.advice.stable: This hive can support honey and crop pollination; expand forage or split it with queen cells.
ecology.advice.queen_excluder: Queen excluders prevent swarms and queen movement while active.
tooltip.ecology.journal.empty: Inspect a hive to record its colony.
tooltip.ecology.village_ledger: Use to survey. Crouch-use villagers to inspect, or bells, stalls, tradeboards, and inventories to mark village systems.
tooltip.ecology.tradeboard: Defines player-stocked villager trades when assigned through a Village Ledger.
tooltip.ecology.queen_cell.empty: Use on a strong colony to prepare queen brood, then install it in an empty hive.
tooltip.ecology.apiary_treatment.smoke: Calms a hive for one Minecraft day.
tooltip.ecology.apiary_treatment.hive_st: Supports hive health for fourteen Minecraft days.
tooltip.ecology.apiary_treatment.queen_e: Prevents swarming and queen migration for fourteen Minecraft days.
tooltip.ecology.apiary_treatment.brood_f: Supports brood and nudges colony growth.
